examples: So pragmatic ambivalence is a good strategy the author uses to realize her novelistic speech act.
So, today we find ourselves in a very different novelistic world than we've been in for the last week and a half: On the Road.
One can understand that Ferrante has no interest in adding her privacy to the novelistic pyre.
Scott Fitzgerald, William Faulkner and Dashiell Hammett infused their film scripts with novelistic craft.
